为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

decision.archive_summary: Active topic is the standalone VS Code context-size visualization feature for Codex. User wants a direct UI entry from the status bar, continuously updating automatically without manual refresh or commands, and explicitly requires strict boundary isolation: do this separately and do not modify or depend on Project Assistant. Assistant said a standalone extension was created and Project Assistant linkage was reverted, but this standalone-extension topic remains the active thread.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is still the same active topic, so relation=continue. Keep the raw requirement/constraint turns that the next turn is likely to depend on, especially the user’s feature requirements and boundary rule. Evict early testing chatter and intermediate assistant status/details that are either resolved or superseded by later turns. Pin the durable product requirements and boundary preference so they can survive later even if raw turns are compacted.
